about_text:
Word Duplicate Content Detection Tool v2.0

An open-source tool for detecting duplicate content in Word documents.

Features:
• Automatically detect duplicate content in Word documents
• Add comments to duplicate content showing source paragraph numbers
• Smart duplicate grouping: same content uses same number
• Accurate paragraph positioning without page number estimation errors
• Customizable detection parameters (default 30 characters)
• Generate new document with comments

Comment Format:
"Duplicate #1: Repeats content from paragraph 25"
• Duplicate #N: All duplicates of same content use same number
• Paragraph Y: Exact paragraph number of duplicate source

Duplicate Numbering Logic:
• Same duplicate content gets same number
• Example: Paragraph A repeats B, Paragraph C also repeats B
• Then A and C will show same duplicate number
• Easy to identify which paragraphs are in same duplicate group

Usage:
1. Select Word document to detect (.docx format)
2. Set minimum duplicate length (default 30 characters, recommend 20-50)
3. Click "Start Detection" button
4. Wait for processing completion, check generated annotated document
5. Use duplicate numbers to quickly identify duplicate groups
6. Use Ctrl+G in Word to jump to specific paragraph

Detection Parameters:
• Minimum duplicate length: Minimum character count considered as "duplicate"
• Too small: May detect too many phrase duplicates
• Too large: May miss some duplicate content
• Recommended range: 20-50 characters

Paragraph Positioning:
• Paragraph numbers start from 1, ordered by document sequence
• Only counts non-empty paragraphs (ignores empty lines)
• Use Ctrl+G in Word to quickly jump to specific paragraph
• Paragraph numbers are accurate without estimation errors

Notes:
• Only supports .docx format Word documents
• Processing time depends on document size and content complexity
• Generated document is in same folder as original
• Original document is not modified
